case_title: MEIER-VIDOVICH JOINT VENTURE VS. YOUNG R. PARK et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, THREE DAY NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEIER-VIDOVICH JOINT VENTURE A CALIFORNIA GENERAL PARTNERSHIP

INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA FANTA CLEANERS BRYANT, JUN HO AKA JUN HO BRYANT PARK INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA FANTA CLEANERS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 650 FOURTH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107 COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
